'''鈭歱-w-sh-ch''' ('''shapawshechoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:nank|nank]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| p-w-sh-ch
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:nank|nank]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歱-w-sh-ch
|-
! Lemma
| shapawshechoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thipawshechoko|thipawshechoko]] || [[word:jipawshechoko|jipawshechoko]] || [[word:shipawshechoko|shipawshechoko]] || [[word:kipawshechoko|kipawshechoko]]
